ddls:
CREATE TABLE "page_layouts" (
  "layout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each page layout configuration */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the page layout configuration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the page layout configuration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the layout was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the layout was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the layout configuration */,
  "scope" TEXT /* Scope of the layout (e.g., global, department, document type) */,
  "parent_layout_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent layout configuration, if applicable */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the layout is currently active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the layout */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the layout */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the layout is the default layout for its scope */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("layout_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "layout_dimensions" (
  "dimension_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dimension configuration */,
  "layout_id" INTEGER /* ID of the page layout configuration */,
  "width" INTEGER /* Page width, including all margins */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Page height, including all margins */,
  "orientation" TEXT /* Page orientation (portrait or landscape) */,
  "margin_left" INTEGER /* Distance from the left page border to the left border of the content area */,
  "margin_right" INTEGER /* Distance from the right page border to the right border of the content area */,
  "margin_top" INTEGER /* Distance from the top page border to the top border of the content area */,
  "margin_bottom" INTEGER /* Distance from the bottom page border to the bottom border of the content area */,
  "content_width" INTEGER /* Width of the content area excluding margins */,
  "content_height" INTEGER /* Height of the content area excluding margins */,
  "is_landscape" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the layout is in landscape orientation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dimension_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_layout_dimensions_layout_id FOREIGN KEY ("layout_id") REFERENCES page_layouts ("layout_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the document type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the document type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the document type is currently active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the document type */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the document type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the department is currently active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the department */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "layout_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each layout assignment */,
  "layout_id" INTEGER /* ID of the page layout configuration */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document type, if applicable */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department, if applicable */,
  "scope" TEXT /* Scope of the assignment (e.g., document type, department) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the assignment is currently active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the assignment */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_layout_assignments_layout_id FOREIGN KEY ("layout_id") REFERENCES page_layouts ("layout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_layout_assignments_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES document_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_layout_assignments_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, editor, viewer) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user is currently active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the user account */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the layout */,
  "layout_id" INTEGER /* ID of the page layout configuration */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time the layout was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_layout_id FOREIGN KEY ("layout_id") REFERENCES page_layouts ("layout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "layout_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each layout version */,
  "layout_id" INTEGER /* ID of the page layout configuration */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the layout configuration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the version is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_layout_versions_layout_id FOREIGN KEY ("layout_id") REFERENCES page_layouts ("layout_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "layout_dimension_versions" (
  "dimension_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dimension version */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the layout version */,
  "width" INTEGER /* Page width, including all margins */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Page height, including all margins */,
  "orientation" TEXT /* Page orientation (portrait or landscape) */,
  "margin_left" INTEGER /* Distance from the left page border to the left border of the content area */,
  "margin_right" INTEGER /* Distance from the right page border to the right border of the content area */,
  "margin_top" INTEGER /* Distance from the top page border to the top border of the content area */,
  "margin_bottom" INTEGER /* Distance from the bottom page border to the bottom border of the content area */,
  "content_width" INTEGER /* Width of the content area excluding margins */,
  "content_height" INTEGER /* Height of the content area excluding margins */,
  "is_landscape" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the layout is in landscape orientation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dimension_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_layout_dimension_versions_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES layout_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "layout_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "layout_id" INTEGER /* ID of the page layout configuration */,
  "note" TEXT /* Note or comment about the layout */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the note */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the note was created */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the note is currently active */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_layout_notes_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_layout_notes_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_layout_notes_layout_id FOREIGN KEY ("layout_id") REFERENCES page_layouts ("layout_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string containing role permissions */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the role is currently active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the role */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the assignment is currently active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the assignment */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the assignment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the assignment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
